title: umbilicus rupestris subsp. gaditanus
intro: Umbilicus rupestris subsp. gaditanus, also known as the Rock Jelly or Gaditan Rock Jelly, is a subspecies of succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including ulcers, fever, and skin infections.
